overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring a dimly lit gothic castle interior. The character walks through stone corridors, examines elaborate medieval tapestries and creature exhibits in a grand hall, passes statues in alcoves, and ascends multiple staircases. The atmosphere is atmospheric and moody with blue-purple lighting, transitioning to a brighter white stone staircase at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone corridor with fire sconces

events.description: character opens heavy wooden door and enters tapestry room

agents.ego_description: Walking steadily through a dimly lit stone corridor toward a large wooden door.

entered.detail: Pointed gothic arch forming the corridor passage
Wall-mounted iron sconce with burning fire providing warm light
Large dark wooden door with metal studs at corridor end
Thick stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic stone corridor illuminated by warm fire sconces. The atmosphere is dim and atmospheric with blue-purple ambient lighting. The character approaches and opens a heavy wooden door at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with medieval tapestries and creature exhibits

events.description: enters large room with floor-to-ceiling medieval tapestries
approaches glass display case containing a creature exhibit

agents.ego_description: Walking along the walls examining large medieval tapestries depicting hunting scenes and looking at creature exhibits in glass cases.

entered.detail: Large wall-sized tapestry depicting medieval figures and unicorns in a forest scene
Tall glass case containing a preserved creature specimen
Humanoid creature figure standing in a display niche
Iron lantern hanging from ceiling providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall with high ceilings and massive medieval tapestries covering the walls. The lighting is dim and atmospheric with a mix of warm lanterns and blue ambient light. The character walks along the tapestries examining the detailed scenes of hunts and figures, then approaches a glass display case containing a creature exhibit before exiting the room.

events.description: passes an NPC student descending the stairs
opens wooden door at top of stairs entering bright staircase

agents.ego_description: Walking through corridors lined with statues in alcoves, then ascending a dark stone stairwell.

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Recessed wall niche containing a stone statue of a robed figure
Tall narrow pointed window with stone tracery
Spiral stone staircase with worn steps
Full suit of medieval armor standing on landing

segments.scene_description: The character exits the tapestry room into a darker corridor lined with statues in alcoves and gothic windows. The character walks past several stone statues before entering a stairwell and beginning to ascend. A student in dark robes passes by descending the stairs. The character continues up the stairs past a suit of armor and opens a wooden door at the landing.

events.description: enters brightly lit white stone staircase from dark corridor

agents.ego_description: Climbing a wide, bright stone staircase lined with framed portraits on the walls.

entered.detail: Wide stone staircase with light-colored marble steps
Framed painting of a historical figure in ornate frame
Decorative carved stone balustrade along staircase
Light-colored limestone wall with bright illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dramatically brighter space featuring a grand staircase made of light-colored stone. The lighting shifts from dark and moody to bright and airy. The character ascends the staircase, passing framed portraits of historical figures hanging on the walls, and approaches a wooden door at the top.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a moody gothic interior that transitions from dim, atmospheric corridors into a bright, airy grand staircase. It begins with the character walking through a narrow stone hallway lit by warm fire sconces and blue-purple ambient light before opening a heavy wooden door. As the camera enters a grand hall, the space expands into a room of high ceilings and massive medieval tapestries, leading the character past a glass creature exhibit and back into a darker corridor lined with statues in alcoves. The scene then shifts toward a stairwell where the character ascends past a descending student and a suit of armor, eventually opening a door at the landing. Finally, the environment transforms into a dramatically brighter space of light-colored stone, where the character climbs a grand staircase adorned with framed portraits toward a final wooden door at the top.
